zh.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdie是Nicholas Pepdie的女兒，於從1342年到1358年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾登格拉斯。她於從1339年到1402年與Thomas Home在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdie是Nicholas Pepdie的女儿，于从1342年到1358年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾登格拉斯。她于从1339年到1402年与Thomas Home在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安登格拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Pepdie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from a pet form of the personal name   Peter  .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: Nicole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Nicholas  , now also in frequent use throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdie was born from 1342 to 1358, in Dunglass, Berwickshire, Scotland as the daughter of Nicholas Pepdie. She married Thomas Home from 1339 to 1402, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1445, in Dunglass, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdieはから1342年まで1358年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアダングラスでNicholas Pepdieの娘として生まれた。から1339年まで1402年にスコットランドでThomas Homeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1445年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダングラスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdie(은)는 1342년 부터 1358년 까지 스컷랜드 버윅실르 던글래스에서 Nicholas Pepdie의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1339년 부터 1402년 까지 스컷랜드에서 Thomas Home(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던글래스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicole Pepdie родилась с 1342 по 1358 в местности дунгласс, бирвиккшир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Nicholas Pepdie. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Home с 1339 по 1402 в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности дунгласс, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.
